name: Alchemist
description:
*There's no sight more beautiful to you than a strange brew bubbling in a beaker, and you consume your ingenious elixirs with abandon. You're fascinated by uncovering the secrets of science and the natural world, and you're constantly experimenting in your lab or on the go with inventive concoctions for every eventuality. You are fearless in the face of risk, hurling explosive or toxic creations at your foes. Your unique path toward greatness is lined with alchemical brews that push your mind and body to their limits.*

Alchemist

subclasses.name: Bomber
subclasses.description: Specialize in bombs, throwing them with precision and control.

subclasses.name: Chirurgeon
subclasses.description: A master healer who uses Crafting for Medicine and brews potent elixirs.

subclasses.name: Mutagenist
subclasses.description: Embrace mutagens, gaining their power with reduced drawbacks.

subclasses.name: Toxicologist
subclasses.description: A master of poisons who crafts and applies deadly toxins.

name: Animist
description:
*You are the interlocutor between the seen and unseen, the voice that connects the mortal and the spiritual. You bond with spirits, manifesting their distinct magic and allowing their knowledge to flow through you. You may favor apparitions that grant you healing magic, others that grant you spells of destructive power, or pick and choose between different apparitions as your environment and circumstances demand. You may consider your powers part of a sacred trust or see your unique abilities as a sign that you've been chosen as a champion of two worlds. Whether you advocate for mortals in the planes beyond or whether you represent the spirits' interests, you provide the bridge between realms.*

Animist

name: Barbarian
description:
*Rage consumes you in battle. You delight in wreaking havoc and using powerful weapons to carve through your enemies, relying on astonishing durability without needing complicated techniques or rigid training. Your rages draw upon a vicious instinct, which you might associate with an animal, a spirit, or some part of yourself. To many barbarians, brute force is a hammer and every problem looks like a nail, whereas others try to hold back the storm of emotions inside them and release their rage only when it matters most.*

Barbarian

subclasses.name: Animal Instinct
subclasses.description: Channel a spirit animal, gaining bestial unarmed attacks.

subclasses.name: Dragon Instinct
subclasses.description: Rage with draconic might and elemental damage.

subclasses.name: Fury Instinct
subclasses.description: Pure, flexible, hard-hitting rage.

subclasses.name: Giant Instinct
subclasses.description: Wield oversized weapons with titanic strength.

subclasses.name: Spirit Instinct
subclasses.description: Channel ancestral spirits, dealing void or vitality damage.

name: Bard
description:
*You are a master of artistry, a scholar of hidden secrets, and a captivating persuader. Using powerful performances, you influence minds and elevate souls to new levels of heroics. You might use your powers to become a charismatic leader, or perhaps you might instead be a counselor, manipulator, scholar, scoundrel, or virtuoso. While your versatility leads some to consider you a beguiling ne'er-do-well and a jack-of-all-trades, it's dangerous to dismiss you as a master of none.*

*Bard*

subclasses.name: Enigma
subclasses.description: A muse of secrets and knowledge; grants the True Strike-flavored Bardic Lore and a focus on Recall Knowledge.

subclasses.name: Maestro
subclasses.description: A muse of music and performance; grants the Lingering Composition feat.

subclasses.name: Polymath
subclasses.description: A muse of many disciplines; grants the Versatile Performance feat.

subclasses.name: Warrior
subclasses.description: A muse of battle; grants a martial weapon proficiency and the Martial Performance feat.

name: Champion
description:
*You are an emissary of a deity, a devoted servant who has taken up a weighty mantle, and you adhere to a code that holds you apart from those around you. While champions exist for every alignment, as a champion of good, you provide certainty and hope to the innocent. You have powerful defenses that you share freely with your allies and innocent bystanders, as well as holy power you use to end the threat of evil. Your devotion even attracts the attention of holy spirits who aid you on your journey.*

*Champion*

name: Cleric
description:
*Deities work their will upon the world in infinite ways, and you serve as one of their most stalwart mortal servants. Blessed with divine magic, you live the ideals of your faith, adorn yourself with the symbols of your church, and train diligently to wield your deity's favored weapon. Your spells might protect and heal your allies, or they might punish foes and enemies of your faith, as your deity wills. Yours is a life of devotion, spreading the teachings of your faith through both word and deed.*

*Cleric*

subclasses.name: Cloistered Cleric
subclasses.description: A scholarly servant; grants a domain and, later, expanded spell access with lighter combat training.

subclasses.name: Warpriest
subclasses.description: A martial servant; grants better armor and weapon training and a Battle Medicine-style resilience.

name: Druid
description:
*The power of nature is impossible to resist. It can bring ruin to the stoutest fortress in minutes, reducing even the mightiest works to rubble, burning them to ash, burying them beneath an avalanche of snow, or drowning them beneath the waves. It can provide endless bounty and breathtaking splendor to those who respect it—and an agonizing death to those who take it too lightly. You are one of those who hear nature's call. You stand in awe of the majesty of its power and give yourself over to its service.*

Druid

subclasses.name: Animal
subclasses.description: Grants an animal companion and the Animal Empathy feat.

subclasses.name: Leaf
subclasses.description: Grants a leshy familiar and the Leshy Familiar feat, focusing on growth and healing.

subclasses.name: Storm
subclasses.description: Grants the Storm Born feat and the Tempest Surge focus spell.

subclasses.name: Untamed
subclasses.description: Grants the Untamed Form (wild shape) feat and shapeshifting focus magic.

name: Exemplar
description:
*As the war god died, his power rained through the many planes of creation, sparking conflict and instilling divine energy in those previously without it. Whether you were directly touched by this power, claimed it from an ancient being or artifact, or whether it awoke something long dormant in your lineage, a spark of the divine now blazes within your soul, granting you abilities, sacred weapons, and divine signifiers that reach into the realm previously reserved for gods and legends. How you wield these tools and grow your power is for you to decide—you may become a hero or you may turn to selfish ends, but one thing is certain: you intend to carve your epithet in history, immortalized in the memory of gods and mortals alike.*

Exemplar

name: Fighter
description:
*Fighting for honor, greed, loyalty, or simply the thrill of battle, you are an undisputed master of weaponry and combat techniques. You combine your actions through clever combinations of opening moves, finishing strikes, and counterattacks whenever your foes are unwise enough to drop their guard. Whether you are a knight, mercenary, sharpshooter, or blade master, you have honed your martial skills into an art form and perform devastating critical attacks on your enemies.*

*Fighter*

name: Gunslinger
description:
*While some fear projectile weapons, you savor the searing flash, wild kick, and cloying smoke that accompanies a gunshot, or snap of the cable and telltale thunk of your crossbow just before your bolt finds purchase. Ready to draw a bead on an enemy at every turn, you rely on your reflexes, steady hand, and knowledge of your weapons to riddle your foes with holes.*

*Gunslinger*

subclasses.name: Drifter
subclasses.description: A versatile gunfighter blending firearms and melee.

subclasses.name: Pistolero
subclasses.description: A quick-draw duelist with one-handed firearms.

subclasses.name: Sniper
subclasses.description: A patient marksman landing devastating aimed shots.

subclasses.name: Vanguard
subclasses.description: A frontline gunner using heavy firearms and area attacks.

name: Inventor
description:
*Any tinkerer can follow a diagram to make a device, but you invent the impossible! Every strange contraption you dream up is a unique experiment pushing the edge of possibility, a mysterious machine that seems to work for only you. You're always on the verge of the next great breakthrough, and every trial and tribulation is another opportunity to test and tune. If you can dream it, you can build it.*

*Inventor*

subclasses.name: Armor Innovation
subclasses.description: A powered suit of armor you tinker with and upgrade.

subclasses.name: Construct Innovation
subclasses.description: A loyal robotic companion you build and improve.

subclasses.name: Weapon Innovation
subclasses.description: A signature weapon packed with experimental upgrades.

name: Investigator
description:
*You seek to uncover the truth, doggedly pursuing leads to reveal the plots of devious villains, discover ancient secrets, or unravel other mysteries. Your analytical mind quickly formulates solutions to complicated problems and your honed senses identify even the most obscure clues. Wielding knowledge as a weapon, you study the creatures and dangers you encounter to exploit their weaknesses.*

*Investigator*

subclasses.name: Alchemical Sciences
subclasses.description: Investigate with chemistry, gaining quick alchemy and versatile vials.

subclasses.name: Empiricism
subclasses.description: Rely on keen observation and deduction to Recall Knowledge.

subclasses.name: Forensic Medicine
subclasses.description: Study wounds and bodies; excel at Medicine and healing.

subclasses.name: Interrogation
subclasses.description: Read people and pursue leads through conversation.

name: Kineticist
description:
*The power of the elements flows from within you. Roaring fire pure water, fleeting air, steadfast earth, twisting wood, slicing metal. A kinetic gate inextricably tied to your body channels power directly from the elemental planes, causing elements to leap to your hand, whirl around your body, and blast foes at your whim. As your connection to the planes grows, you attain true mastery over your chosen elements.*

*Kineticist*

subclasses.name: Air
subclasses.description: Command wind and lightning — mobile, precise impulses.

subclasses.name: Earth
subclasses.description: Command stone and soil — sturdy, defensive impulses.

subclasses.name: Fire
subclasses.description: Unleash flame — aggressive, high-damage impulses.

subclasses.name: Metal
subclasses.description: Shape metal — sharp, versatile impulses.

subclasses.name: Water
subclasses.description: Flow with water and ice — control and healing impulses.

subclasses.name: Wood
subclasses.description: Channel living wood — protective, sustaining impulses.

name: Magus
description:
*Combining the physicality and technique of a warrior with the ability to cast arcane magic, you seek to perfect the art of fusing spell and strike. While the hefty tome you carry reflects hours conducting arcane research, your enemies need no reminder of your training. They recognize it as you take them down.*

*Magus*

subclasses.name: Inexorable Iron
subclasses.description: Two-handed weapons and toughness; a mighty Spellstrike.

subclasses.name: Laughing Shadow
subclasses.description: Mobile, one-handed finesse with a free hand.

subclasses.name: Sparkling Targe
subclasses.description: Sword-and-board, warding yourself with magical shields.

subclasses.name: Starlit Span
subclasses.description: Spellstrike at range with a bow or thrown weapon.

subclasses.name: Twisting Tree
subclasses.description: Master a staff, blending reach and versatility.

name: Monk
description:
*The strength of your fist flows from your mind and spirit. You seek perfection-honing your body into a flawless instrument and your mind into an orderly bastion of wisdom. You're a fierce combatant renowned for martial arts skills and combat stances that grant you unique fighting moves. While the challenge of mastering many fighting styles drives you to great heights, you also enjoy meditating on philosophical questions and discovering new ways to obtain peace and enlightenment.*

*Monk*

name: Oracle
description:
*Your conduit to divine power eschews the traditional channels of prayer and servitude—you instead glean sacred truths and great mysteries embodied in overarching concepts, whether because you perceive the common ground across multiple deities or circumvent their power entirely.*

*You explore one of these mysteries and draw upon its power to cast miraculous spells, but that power comes with a terrible price: a curse that grows stronger the more you draw upon it, which you might uphold as an instrument of the divine or view as punishment from the gods.*

*Oracle*

subclasses.name: Ancestors
subclasses.description: Commune with ancestral spirits for guidance and skill.

subclasses.name: Battle
subclasses.description: A martial oracle who wades into the fray.

subclasses.name: Bones
subclasses.description: Command death and undeath.

subclasses.name: Cosmos
subclasses.description: Channel the stars and the night sky.

subclasses.name: Flames
subclasses.description: Wield searing fire and light.

subclasses.name: Life
subclasses.description: A healer bound to the cycle of life.

subclasses.name: Lore
subclasses.description: A keeper of secret knowledge.

subclasses.name: Tempest
subclasses.description: Command storms, wind, and water.

name: Psychic
description:
*The mind can perceive truths hidden to fine-tuned instruments, house more secrets than any tome, and move objects and hearts more deftly than any lever. By delving into both the conscious and subconscious aspects of your inner self, you have awoken to the might of psychic magic, allowing you to cast spells not through incantations or gestures but by the power of your will alone. While the thin line between your mind and reality means that a single errant thought could have unintended consequences for yourself and your companions, you know that anything is possible, if you can imagine it.*

*Psychic*

subclasses.name: The Distant Grasp
subclasses.description: Telekinesis — move and strike from afar.

subclasses.name: The Infinite Eye
subclasses.description: Divination and sharpened senses.

subclasses.name: The Oscillating Wave
subclasses.description: Fire and cold, entropy and energy.

subclasses.name: The Silent Whisper
subclasses.description: Words and thoughts that pierce the mind.

subclasses.name: The Unbound Step
subclasses.description: Teleportation and swift movement.

subclasses.name: The Tangible Dream
subclasses.description: Shape illusions into something real.

name: Ranger
description:
*Some rangers believe civilization wears down the soul, but still needs to be protected from wild creatures. Others say nature needs to be protected from the greedy, who wish to tame its beauty and plunder its treasures. You could champion either goal, or both. You might be a scout, tracker, or hunter of fugitives or beasts, haunting the edge of civilization or exploring the wilds. You know how to live off the land and are skilled at spotting and taking down both opportune prey and hated enemies.*

*Ranger*

subclasses.name: Flurry
subclasses.description: Reduce the multiple attack penalty against your hunted prey.

subclasses.name: Precision
subclasses.description: Deal extra precision damage on your first hit against your hunted prey each turn.

subclasses.name: Outwit
subclasses.description: Gain bonuses to skills and AC against your hunted prey.

name: Rogue
description:
*You are skilled and opportunistic. Using your sharp wits and quick reactions, you take advantage of your opponents' missteps and strike where it hurts most. You play a dangerous game, seeking thrills and testing your skills, and likely don't care much for any laws that happen to get in your way. While the path of every rogue is unique and riddled with danger, the one thing you all share in common is the breadth and depth of your skills.*

*Rogue*

subclasses.name: Ruffian
subclasses.description: Intimidation-based bruiser; use medium armor and sneak attack with simple weapons.

subclasses.name: Scoundrel
subclasses.description: Deception/Diplomacy trickster; feint to make foes flat-footed.

subclasses.name: Thief
subclasses.description: Classic thief; add Dexterity instead of Strength to finesse melee damage.

subclasses.name: Mastermind
subclasses.description: Cunning tactician; Recall Knowledge to make foes flat-footed.

name: Sorcerer
description:
*You didn't choose to become a spellcaster-you were born one. There's magic in your blood, whether a divinity touched one of your ancestors, a forebear communed with a primal creature, or a powerful occult ritual influenced your line. Self-reflection and study allow you to refine your inherent magical skills and unlock new, more powerful abilities. The power in your blood carries a risk, however, and you constantly face the choice of whether you'll rise to become a master spellcaster or fall into destruction.*

*Sorcerer*

subclasses.name: Aberrant
subclasses.description: Alien power from beyond — occult magic.

subclasses.name: Angelic
subclasses.description: Celestial heritage — divine magic.

subclasses.name: Demonic
subclasses.description: Abyssal destruction — divine magic.

subclasses.name: Diabolic
subclasses.description: Infernal cunning — divine magic.

subclasses.name: Draconic
subclasses.description: The might of dragons — arcane magic.

subclasses.name: Elemental
subclasses.description: Raw elemental force — primal magic.

subclasses.name: Fey
subclasses.description: First World whimsy — primal magic.

subclasses.name: Hag
subclasses.description: Cursed heritage — occult magic.

subclasses.name: Imperial
subclasses.description: Arcane bloodline of old empires — arcane magic.

subclasses.name: Undead
subclasses.description: The chill of undeath — divine magic.

name: Summoner
description:
*You can magically beckon a powerful being called an eidolon to your side, serving as the mortal conduit that anchors it to the world. Whether your eidolon is a friend, a servant, or even a personal god, your connection to it marks you as extraordinary, shaping the course of your life dramatically.*

*Summoner*

subclasses.name: Beast Eidolon
subclasses.description: A bestial companion of claw and fang.

subclasses.name: Construct Eidolon
subclasses.description: A crafted, resilient guardian.

subclasses.name: Dragon Eidolon
subclasses.description: A proud draconic ally.

subclasses.name: Elemental Eidolon
subclasses.description: A being of raw element.

subclasses.name: Fey Eidolon
subclasses.description: A capricious First World spirit.

subclasses.name: Plant Eidolon
subclasses.description: A verdant, growing companion.

subclasses.name: Celestial Eidolon
subclasses.description: A radiant celestial ally.

subclasses.name: Fiendish Eidolon
subclasses.description: A sinister lower-planar ally.

subclasses.name: Psychopomp Eidolon
subclasses.description: A shepherd of souls.

subclasses.name: Undead Eidolon
subclasses.description: A restless undead companion.

name: Swashbuckler
description:
*Many warriors rely on brute force, weighty armor, or cumbersome weapons. For you, battle is a dance where you move among foes with style and grace. You dart among combatants with flair and land powerful finishing moves with a flick of the wrist and a flash of the blade, all while countering attacks with elegant ripostes that keep enemies off balance. Harassing and thwarting your foes lets you charm fate and cheat death time and again with aplomb and plenty of flair.*

*Swashbuckler*

subclasses.name: Battledancer
subclasses.description: Gain panache by Performing — graceful and inspiring.

subclasses.name: Braggart
subclasses.description: Gain panache by Demoralizing — brash and bold.

subclasses.name: Fencer
subclasses.description: Gain panache by Feinting — cunning and precise.

subclasses.name: Gymnast
subclasses.description: Gain panache with Athletics — acrobatic and forceful.

subclasses.name: Wit
subclasses.description: Gain panache with Bon Mot — clever and charming.

name: Thaumaturge
description:
*The world is full of the unexplainable: ancient magic, dead gods, and even stranger things. In response, you've scavenged the best parts of every magical tradition and built up a collection of esoterica—a broken holy relic here, a sprig of mistletoe there—that you can use to best any creature by exploiting their weaknesses and vulnerabilities. The mystic implement you carry is both badge and weapon, its symbolic weight helping you bargain with and subdue the supernatural. Every path to power has its restrictions and costs, but you turn them all to your advantage. You're a thaumaturge, and you work wonders.*

*Thaumaturge*

subclasses.name: Amulet
subclasses.description: A protective charm warding you from harm.

subclasses.name: Bell
subclasses.description: A ringing tool that unsettles and banishes.

subclasses.name: Chalice
subclasses.description: A vessel of healing and vitality.

subclasses.name: Lantern
subclasses.description: A light that reveals the hidden.

subclasses.name: Mirror
subclasses.description: A reflection you can send forth.

subclasses.name: Regalia
subclasses.description: Symbols of authority that command respect.

subclasses.name: Tome
subclasses.description: A book of esoteric lore.

subclasses.name: Wand
subclasses.description: A conduit for a blast of energy.

subclasses.name: Weapon
subclasses.description: A martial implement for the front line.

name: Witch
description:
*You command powerful magic, not through study or devotion, but as an agent for an otherworldly patron that even you don't entirely understand. This entity might be a covert divinity, a powerful fey, an ancient spirit, or any other mighty supernatural being—but its nature is likely as much a mystery to you as it is to others. Through a special familiar, your patron grants you versatile spells and powerful hexes to use as you see fit, though you're never certain if you're merely serving your patron's larger plan.*

*Witch*

subclasses.name: Faith's Flamekeeper
subclasses.description: A divine patron of fire and zeal; grants the divine tradition and Phase Familiar.

subclasses.name: The Inscribed One
subclasses.description: An arcane patron of secret text; grants the arcane tradition and Discern Secrets.

subclasses.name: The Resentment
subclasses.description: An occult patron of spite; grants the occult tradition and Evil Eye.

subclasses.name: Silence in Snow
subclasses.description: A primal patron of cold silence; grants the primal tradition and Clinging Ice.

subclasses.name: Spinner of Threads
subclasses.description: An occult patron of fate; grants the occult tradition and Nudge Fate.

subclasses.name: Starless Shadow
subclasses.description: An occult patron of darkness; grants the occult tradition and Shroud of Night.

subclasses.name: Wilding Steward
subclasses.description: A primal patron of the wild; grants the primal tradition and a nature-themed hex.

name: Wizard
description:
*You are an eternal student of the secrets of the universe, using your mastery of magic to cast powerful spells. You treat magic like a science, cross-referencing the latest texts on practical spellcraft with ancient tomes to discover and understand arcane magic. Yet magical theory is vast, and there's no way you can study it all. Most wizards learn through formal schooling, with their curriculum informing a specific rubric, although particularly driven researchers sometimes piece together their own theories.*

*Wizard*

subclasses.name: Improved Familiar Attunement
subclasses.description: Your familiar is more capable, gaining an extra ability and improving as you level.

subclasses.name: Metamagical Experimentation
subclasses.description: Gain a metamagic feat and swap metamagic options during your studies.

subclasses.name: Spell Blending
subclasses.description: Trade prepared spell slots to prepare higher-level spells or extra cantrips.

subclasses.name: Spell Substitution
subclasses.description: Swap prepared spells for others during the day with a short study.

name: Necromancer
description: An occult spellcaster who manipulates vitality and void, raising expendable thralls to control the battlefield and fuel grave spells.

subclasses.name: Bone Shaper
subclasses.description: Osteomancers who craft skeletons and shape bone. Grants the Bone Spear grave spell (via its class feat), the Fleet general feat, and nimble thralls that can dodge area damage.

subclasses.name: Flesh Magician
subclasses.description: Caromancers who manipulate dead flesh. Grants the Dead Weight grave spell (via its class feat), the Toughness general feat, and thralls that leave difficult terrain when destroyed.

subclasses.name: Spirit Monger
subclasses.description: Vitamancers who play with the energies of the living and dead. Grants the Life Tap grave spell (via its class feat), the Diehard general feat, and thralls that can deal spirit or void damage.

name: Runesmith
description: Equal parts scholar and artist, you etch and trace mystic runes to empower allies and punish foes, invoking their true names to unleash their magic. Not a spellcaster — runes are applied and invoked in play.
